creator: pomoke@typeof.pw
text:
'mysqld' issued a system call that panicked the kernel.

kernel: Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
kernel: cpuid = 0; apic id = 00
kernel: fault virtual address = 0x18
kernel: fault code            = supervisor read data, page not present
kernel: instruction pointer   = 0x20:0xffffffff80c5d6f0
kernel: stack pointer         = 0x28:0xfffffe001139e4b0
kernel: frame pointer         = 0x28:0xfffffe001139e4e0
kernel: code segment          = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
kernel:                       = DPL 0, pres 1, long 1, def32 0, gran 1
kernel: processor eflags      = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
kernel: current process               = 98556 (mysqld)
kernel: trap number           = 12
kernel: panic: page fault
kernel: cpuid = 0
kernel: time = 1596433787
